- **SQL Practice**

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Learn SQL - Online SQL Terminal - Practice SQL Queries](https://www.sql-practice.com/)- A platform to practice SQL queries interactively.

  

- **API Development**

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [API Platform for Laravel - Laravel News](https://laravel-news.com/api-platform-for-laravel?ref=dailydev)- Guide on building APIs in Laravel with best practices and tools.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAABAAAAAQCAYAAAAf8/9hAAAAN0lEQVQ4jWNgoDH4D8U4ASOaYlzy+ORwKiDGdYMU4HMahhwTpbYNvAGDB5CdkKiWlPHZQtskCwA+8A3/gOGSKgAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==) [JSONPlaceholder - Free Fake REST API](https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/)- A free online REST API for testing and prototyping.

  

- **Database Design**

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [ERDPlus](https://erdplus.com/standalone)- A tool for creating Entity-Relationship diagrams and relational schemas.

  

- **Laravel**

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [How to Build Laravel 11 API From Scratch](https://laraveldaily.com/course/api-laravel?mtm_campaign=search-results-course)- A course on building APIs using Laravel 11.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Deploy a Laravel App with GitHub Actions](https://github.com/1aWebmarketing/github-laravel-deploy)- A guide to automating Laravel app deployment using GitHub Actions.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [MySQL Visual Explain](https://mysqlexplain.com/?ref=dailydev)- MySQL Visual Explain

  

A tool for visualizing MySQL query execution plans.

  

- [Implementing Passkey Authentication in Your Laravel App](https://blog.joe.codes/implementing-passkey-authentication-in-your-laravel-app?ref=dailydev)- Learn how to implement passkey authentication for enhanced security.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [InvoiceShelf - Open Source Laravel Application](https://github.com/InvoiceShelf/InvoiceShelf?ref=dailydev)- An open-source Laravel app for invoice management.

  

### 🛠️ Laravel Best Practices:

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [20+ Laravel Best Practices, Tips, and Tricks to Use in 2024](https://benjamincrozat.com/laravel-best-practices)- A collection of Laravel best practices for modern web development.A collection of Laravel best practices for modern web development.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [19+ Laravel Best Practices for Developers in 2024](https://buttercms.com/blog/laravel-best-practices/)- Best practices for Laravel developers to boost productivity and performance.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Laravel Best Practices GitHub Repository](https://github.com/alexeymezenin/laravel-best-practices)- A GitHub repo containing a collection of useful Laravel best practices.

  

### ⚙️ Laravel Optimization:

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Stop Slow Laravel Apps! Optimize with Smart Caching](https://medium.com/@raiyanmemon/stop-slow-laravel-apps-optimize-with-smart-caching-e7fe7f2be534)- A guide on optimizing slow Laravel apps using advanced caching techniques.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [The 7 Levels of Laravel Optimization](https://summonshr.medium.com/the-7-levels-of-laravel-optimization-from-rookie-to-optimization-overlord-with-benchmark-49009488419b)- Learn Laravel optimization from beginner to advanced levels.

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Laravel Response Cache](https://github.com/spatie/laravel-responsecache)- Learn Laravel optimization from beginner to advanced levels.

  

### 🔧 Laravel Development Tools:

  

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Laravel Backup Server v4](https://laravel-news.com/spatie-laravel-backup-server-v4-released-as-open-source?ref=dailydev)- A tool for managing Laravel backups with ease.

- [Laravel Playground](https://laravelplayground.com/?ref=dailydev)- An online tool for experimenting with Laravel code snippets in real-time.

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Laravel View Creators](https://laravel-news.com/laravel-view-creators?ref=dailydev)- A resource for creating dynamic Laravel views easily.

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Laravel Updater](https://salahhusa9.com/laravel-updater?ref=dailydev)- A tool to simplify updating Laravel applications.

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Things to Do After a Fresh Laravel Install](https://msamgan.com/things-to-do-after-a-fresh-laravel-install)- A list of tasks to set up after a fresh Laravel installation.

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Laravel 11 Cron Job Task Scheduling Example](https://medium.com/@techsolutionstuff/laravel-11-cron-job-task-scheduling-example-b58da7687b38)- A tutorial for scheduling tasks with cron jobs in Laravel 11.

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Complete Guide to Laravel Folder and File Structure](https://featuredeveloper.blogspot.com/2024/10/complete-guide-to-laravel-folder-and.html)- A comprehensive guide on understanding Laravel folder and file structure.

- ![ICON](data:image/png;base64,) [Laravel Admin Panel](https://github.com/z-song/laravel-admin)- An open-source admin panel for Laravel applications.
